scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && bun run check:browser-smoke && cd packages/web-ui && bun run check
scripts.version:patch: bun run version:patch -ws && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.version:minor: bun run version:minor -ws && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.version:major: bun run version:major -ws && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run check
scripts.publish: bun run prepublishOnly && bun publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: bun run prepublishOnly && bun publish -ws --access public --dry-run
